name: Successful Overpass the Hash Attempt "behavior of e.g Mimikatz's sekurlsa::pth module."
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Roberto Rodriguez (source), Dominik Schaudel (rule)
SIGMA Title: Successful Overpass the Hash Attempt
SIGMA Description: Detects successful logon with logon type 9 (NewCredentials) which matches the Overpass the Hash behavior of e.g Mimikatz's sekurlsa::pth module.

False positives:
- Runas command-line tool using /netonly parameter

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4624 AND "Logon Type"=9 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%seclogo%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%negotiate%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Successful Overpass the Hash Attempt "behavior of e.g Mimikatz's sekurlsa::pth module." on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4624 AND "Logon Type"=9 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%seclogo%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%negotiate%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Successful Overpass the Hash Attempt "behavior of e.g Mimikatz's sekurlsa::pth module."
